_comment: SQLTriage governance scoring weights. Reloadable at runtime via IOptionsMonitor. Edit via Settings page or this file directly.
_rationale: Compliance raised to 20% (not 5%) because tagline is audit-prep. Security is primary; Performance/Reliability equal secondary; Blocking is first-class (not derived); Cost is tertiary. Weights sum to 1.0.

caps._comment: Three-level clamp. perFinding prevents one critical from dominating; perCategory enforces category weight ceiling; overall = 100.

bands._comment: Governance maturity bands with scoring thresholds. 69 Silver is an honest assessment — Gold requires consistently strong performance across all 5 dimensions.

categoryMapping._comment: Maps check categories → 5 governance dimensions. Unmapped defaults to Reliability.
